remarks: Totally renovated studio apartment! - New kitchen with white shaker-style cabinets, black stainless appliances, and custom wood counters! - New bathroom with standing shower, vanity, and tile floor - New lighting & flooring! - Ductless heating & cooling system - Custom reclaimed barn beam accent detail - Off / street parking for 1 car - Laundry room in building - 1 cat or small dog considered on case-by-case basis with a $50 / month pet fee
